headline: Nike Stock Upgraded On Turnaround Efforts, Analyst Sees 30% Premium
summary: Barclays lauds Nike turnaround efforts, sees 30% premium to NKE stock. Shares reverse from an early surge Wednesday.

headline: Nike Stock Gets an Upgrade.  Investors Are Too Skeptical, It’s Time to Buy, Analyst Says.
summary: Nike stock got upgraded by Barclays analysts Wednesday, citing investors’ “peak skepticism” about the sportswear giant’s prospects and signs of operational progress.  Barclays upgraded  Nike  shares to Overweight from Equal Weight in a note published Wednesday, with a new price target of $73, up from $64.  The sportswear retailer’s stock has slumped 26% over the past year, lagging the  which has climbed 21% over the same period.

headline: Oracle, Nike, Casey's General Stores: Top Analyst Calls
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma outlines some of Wall Street's top analyst calls today: JPMorgan, Oppenheimer, and Bernstein on Oracle (ORCL); Barclays on Nike (NKE); and Deutsche Bank and Evercore on Casey's General Stores (CASY). headline: Assessing Nike (NKE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: Why NIKE (NKE) is on investors’ radar today NIKE (NKE) shares have pulled back with a negative return over the past year and past 3 months, which is prompting some investors to reassess how the current price reflects the company’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for NIKE. At a share price of US$56.08, NIKE’s 30 day share price return of 12.27% and 90 day share price return of 14.76% sit against a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 22.49%. This suggests that recent momentum...
